title: SUN.STUDIO Per-User Slide Style Profile
description: A versioned, human-editable, project-local set of APPROVED design preferences for one user. It influences safe composition and within-band tie-breaking only. It can never override approved source content, SUN.STUDIO canonical brand tokens, accessibility/readability, canvas bounds, published-only retrieval, content fidelity, or component slot contracts. It carries NO CSS/HTML/JS, no raw deck text, no secrets, and no inferred data. See slide-system/rules/style-profiles.md for precedence.

profile_id.description: User-scoped id. Profiles are selected explicitly by id/path; one user's profile is never loaded implicitly for another.

version.description: Semantic version of this profile file.

owner.description: Human-readable owner label. Not an identity/auth field.

description.description: Optional plain-language note about this profile.

preferences.description: Only these whitelisted, enum-bounded design preferences are honoured. Anything else is rejected by validate_style_profile.py.
